name: Twinkies
recipeIngredient: 1 Yellow cake mix, prepared as directed on box
1 Lemon cake mix, prepared as directed on box
1 White cake mix, prepared as directed on box
1 Can pineapple chunks in juice (not with pineapple)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mixes together following the recipes on the boxes.
- Substitute pineapple juice for water in the white cake mix.
2. Combine all the cake mixes thoroughly.
3. Fill muffin tins with the batter and bake at 350°F until lightly browned.
